TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_pwn_cawtun, title = cawtun, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Paiwan]}, url = {https://pwn.wikipedia.org/wiki/cawtun} }

S.FORM: tjaiteku a pinaljavakan aicu a cawtun nua lamtaw king. sa sivecivecik aza vavecikan a pinairangan tua cawtun a "Chh√°u-t√Ļn" ayain. a i vecekadan a kadjunangan a cawtun tua tayuan. a i pasaviri a kaledep a cawtun tua lamtaw king. a i pasakaledep tua cianghua. a i pasaviri tua taiciu. pazangal izua mareka palidring a djalan a pasamaza i cawtun matu sikamasantjelulj, sikanmasan 14, sikamasan 63 katua sikamasan 76 a palidring a djalan nua tayuan, matu sikamasantjelulj, katua sikamasannemelj a palidring a djalan nua kunian. pinapungadan ta sipaljavakan caucau sipacacikelan palidring a djalan palidring a djalan na vuremusa (Formosa) sikamasantjelulj a palidring a djalan na vuremusa (Formosa) sikamasannemelj a palidring a djalan na vuremusa (Formosa) palidring a djalan na taiwan sikamasantjelulj a palidring a djalan na taiwan sikamasantjelulj-A a palidring a djalan na taiwan sikamasansimuluq saka sepatj a palidring a djalan na taiwan sikamasansimuluq saka sepatj-A a palidring a djalan na taiwan sikamasan 63 a palidring a djalan na taiwan sikamasan 63-A a palidring a djalan na taiwan palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasan 148 a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sangasangasan a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasanmusalj a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasantjelulj a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasansimatjelj a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasannemelj a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasanpitjulj a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasanvalulj a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasansivalj a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasansimuluq a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasansimuluq saka ita a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasansimuluq saka sepatj a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasansimuluq saka pitju a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasansimuluq saka siva a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasan 92 a palidring a djalan na lamtaw basu kinapacacikelan aicu a cawtun. a i pasaviri tua buvung , tali , taiciu . a i pasanavalj tua lamtaw , teksan , katua suili . a i pasakacedas tua kusin katua puli . a i pasakaledep tua cianghua , wanlim , lukang katua zuma a lizulizuk. pazangal a ljaljevavavan tua basu nua i cawtun imaza tua matjaliaw sipasusuan a djalan nua basu. izua drusa a ljaljevavavan nua basu imaza i cawtun. a i djalan a cunsing izua ljaljevavavan tua basu nua taiciu katua basu nua kukang. patjara ljaljevavavan tua zuma a basu, matu basu nua cianghua, basu nua lamtaw, basu nua cuanhang, basu nua wanlim, basu nua cunta, basu nua tunlian, pubasuan izua i sikamasanmusalj a djalan a taiping. basu nua taiciu 108 a basu a kemasi tua ljaljevavavan na kangbuy a patje taigaku a nankai. basu nua i lizuk a lamtaw basu a patjeqalja basu a pasa djalan nua kunian kivangavangan == kasizuan ==
S.PHON: ¶ait…ôku a pina éavakan ai ¶u a ¶awtun nua …≠amtaw kiŇč. sa siv…ô ¶iv…ô ¶ik aza vav…ô ¶ikan a pinairaŇčan tua ¶awtun a " ¶hh*u-t*n" ajain. a i v…ô ¶…ôkadan a ka…ČunaŇčan a ¶awtun tua tajuan. a i pasaviri a ka…≠…ôd…ôp a ¶awtun tua …≠amtaw kiŇč. a i pasaka…≠…ôd…ôp tua ¶iaŇčhua. a i pasaviri tua tai ¶iu. pazaŇča…≠ izua mar…ôka pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an a pasamaza i ¶awtun matu sikamasan ¶…ô…≠u é, sikanmasan **, sikamasan ** katua sikamasan ** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua tajuan, matu sikamasan ¶…ô…≠u é, katua sikamasann…ôm…ô é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an nua kunian. pinapuŇčadan ta sipa éavakan ¶au ¶au sipa ¶a ¶ik…ô…≠an pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na vur…ômusa (*urmusa) sikamasan ¶…ô…≠u é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na vur…ômusa (*urmusa) sikamasann…ôm…ô é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na vur…ômusa (*urmusa) pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan sikamasan ¶…ô…≠u é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan sikamasan ¶…ô…≠u é-a a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan sikamasansimu…≠uq saka s…ôpa ¶ a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan sikamasansimu…≠uq saka s…ôpa ¶-a a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan sikamasan ** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan sikamasan **-a a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na taiwan pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasan *** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw saŇčasaŇčasan a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasanmusa é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasan ¶…ô…≠u é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasansima ¶…ô é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasann…ôm…ô é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasanpi ¶u é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasanva…≠u é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasansiva é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq saka ita a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq saka s…ôpa ¶ a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq saka pi ¶u a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq saka siva a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasan ** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw basu kinapa ¶a ¶ik…ô…≠an ai ¶u a ¶awtun. a i pasaviri tua buvuŇč , ta…≠i , tai ¶iu . a i pasanava é tua …≠amtaw , t…ôksan , katua sui…≠i . a i pasaka ¶…ôdas tua kusin katua pu…≠i . a i pasaka…≠…ôd…ôp tua ¶iaŇčhua , wan…≠im , …≠ukaŇč katua zuma a …≠izu…≠izuk. pazaŇča…≠ a éa é…ôvavavan tua basu nua i ¶awtun imaza tua ma ¶a…≠iaw sipasusuan a …Ča…≠an nua basu. izua …Ėusa a éa é…ôvavavan nua basu imaza i ¶awtun. a i …Ča…≠an a ¶unsiŇč izua éa é…ôvavavan tua basu nua tai ¶iu katua basu nua kukaŇč. pa ¶ara éa é…ôvavavan tua zuma a basu, matu basu nua ¶iaŇčhua, basu nua …≠amtaw, basu nua ¶uanhaŇč, basu nua wan…≠im, basu nua ¶unta, basu nua tun…≠ian, pubasuan izua i sikamasanmusa é a …Ča…≠an a taipiŇč. basu nua tai ¶iu *** a basu a k…ômasi tua éa é…ôvavavan na kaŇčbuj a pa ¶…ô taigaku a nankai. basu nua i …≠izuk a …≠amtaw basu a pa ¶…ôqa éa basu a pasa …Ča…≠an nua kunian kivaŇčavaŇčan == kasizuan ==
S.FORM: tjaiteku a pinaljavakan aicu a cawtun nua lamtaw king. sa sivecivecik aza vavecikan a pinairangan tua cawtun a "Chh√°u-t√Ļn" ayain. a i vecekadan a kadjunangan a cawtun tua tayuan. a i pasaviri a kaledep a cawtun tua lamtaw king. a i pasakaledep tua cianghua. a i pasaviri tua taiciu. pazangal izua mareka palidring a djalan a pasamaza i cawtun matu sikamasantjelulj, sikanmasan 14, sikamasan 63 katua sikamasan 76 a palidring a djalan nua tayuan, matu sikamasantjelulj, katua sikamasannemelj a palidring a djalan nua kunian. pinapungadan ta sipaljavakan caucau sipacacikelan palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasansimuluq saka siva a palidring a djalan na lamtaw sikamasan 92 a palidring a djalan na lamtaw basu kinapacacikelan aicu a cawtun. a i pasaviri tua buvung , tali , taiciu . a i pasanavalj tua lamtaw , teksan , katua suili . a i pasakacedas tua kusin katua puli . a i pasakaledep tua cianghua , wanlim , lukang katua zuma a lizulizuk. pazangal a ljaljevavavan tua basu nua i cawtun imaza tua matjaliaw sipasusuan a djalan nua basu. izua drusa a ljaljevavavan nua basu imaza i cawtun. a i djalan a cunsing izua ljaljevavavan tua basu nua taiciu katua basu nua kukang. patjara ljaljevavavan tua zuma a basu, matu basu nua cianghua, basu nua lamtaw, basu nua cuanhang, basu nua wanlim, basu nua cunta, basu nua tunlian, pubasuan izua i sikamasanmusalj a djalan a taiping. basu nua taiciu 108 a basu a kemasi tua ljaljevavavan na kangbuy a patje taigaku a nankai. basu nua i lizuk a lamtaw basu a patjeqalja basu a pasa djalan nua kunian kivangavangan == kasizuan ==

i pasaviri a ka…≠…ôd…ôp a ¶awtun tua …≠amtaw kiŇč. a i pasaka…≠…ôd…ôp tua ¶iaŇčhua. a i pasaviri tua tai ¶iu. pazaŇča…≠ izua mar…ôka pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an a pasamaza i ¶awtun matu sikamasan ¶…ô…≠u é, na …≠amtaw sikamasan *** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw saŇčasaŇčasan a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasanmusa é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasan ¶…ô…≠u é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasansima ¶…ô é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasann…ôm…ô é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasanpi ¶u é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasanva…≠u é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasansiva é a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq saka ita a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq saka s…ôpa ¶ a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq saka pi ¶u a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasansimu…≠uq saka siva a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw sikamasan ** a pa…≠i…ĖiŇč a …Ča…≠an na …≠amtaw basu kinapa ¶a ¶ik…ô…≠an ai ¶u a ¶awtun. a i pasaviri tua buvuŇč , ta…≠i , tai ¶iu . a i pasanava é tua …≠amtaw , t…ôksan , katua sui…≠i . a i pasaka ¶…ôdas tua kusin katua pu…≠i . a i pasaka…≠…ôd…ôp tua ¶iaŇčhua , wan…≠im , …≠ukaŇč katua zuma a …≠izu…≠izuk. pazaŇča…≠ a éa é…ôvavavan tua basu nua i ¶awtun imaza tua ma ¶a…≠iaw sipasusuan a …Ča…≠an nua basu. izua …Ėusa a éa é…ôvavavan nua basu imaza i ¶awtun. a i …Ča…≠an a ¶unsiŇč izua éa é…ôvavavan tua basu nua tai ¶iu katua basu nua kukaŇč. pa ¶ara éa é…ôvavavan tua zuma a basu, matu basu nua ¶iaŇčhua, basu nua …≠amtaw, basu nua ¶uanhaŇč, basu nua wan…≠im, basu nua ¶unta, basu nua tun…≠ian, pubasuan izua i sikamasanmusa é a …Ča…≠an a taipiŇč. basu nua tai ¶iu *** a basu a k…ômasi tua éa é…ôvavavan na kaŇčbuj a pa ¶…ô taigaku a nankai. basu nua i …≠izuk a …≠amtaw basu a pa ¶…ôqa éa basu a pasa …Ča…≠an nua kunian kivaŇčavaŇčan == kasizuan ==
